bench_q1_discomfort_location.shoulders: Tuck elbows (about 45°) and keep shoulders set back.
bench_q1_discomfort_location.wrists: Stack wrists over elbows and keep knuckles up.
bench_q1_discomfort_location.none: Form looks solid. Focus on driving through your feet.

squat_q1_discomfort_location.lower_back: Brace your core harder and avoid 'butt wink' at the bottom.
squat_q1_discomfort_location.knees: Push your knees out and keep your weight on your mid-foot.
squat_q1_discomfort_location.none: Great depth. Maintain a proud chest throughout the lift.

deadlift_q1_discomfort_location.lower_back: Hinge at the hips and keep the bar close to your shins.
deadlift_q1_discomfort_location.grip: Try using chalk or a mixed grip for heavier sets.
deadlift_q1_discomfort_location.none: Solid lockout. Keep pulling through the heels.

ohp_q1_discomfort_location.shoulders: Keep your core tight and avoid shrugging your shoulders at the start.
ohp_q1_discomfort_location.lower_back: Avoid excessive arching; squeeze your glutes to stabilize your spine.
ohp_q1_discomfort_location.none: Strong overhead position. Keep the bar path vertical.

row_q1_discomfort_location.lower_back: Maintain a flat back and pull the bar towards your lower stomach.
row_q1_discomfort_location.elbows: Lead the pull with your elbows and avoid 'flailing' them out.
row_q1_discomfort_location.none: Good squeeze at the top. Keep your neck in a neutral position.
